name: Sweet Oatmeal Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 teaspoons Red Star active dry yeast
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients to the bread machine pan.
2. Select the Light crust setting.
3. Press Start.
4. If your machine requires it, adjust the settings to Light or Adjust Temp. Sensor for Light crust.
5. Choose Bake Light (or White Bread) as the menu selection.
6. For machines that need adjustment, set to Light crust or select White Bread.
7. Note: The bread can be programmed for delayed baking if desired.
8. This recipe yields a 1-1/2 lb loaf.
